action.reasoning: Observation: I'm still getting a FileNotFoundError because the image path is incorrect. The error shows '/data/images/images/showui-3c3972f322ab.png' which has a double 'images' in the path. Looking at the data again, the 'image_path' field in the JSONL already includes 'images/' prefix, so I shouldn't prepend another 'images/' directory. However, I also need to fix the DataCollator implementation which was truncated. I'll update the dataset to use the correct image path and complete the DataCollator implementation.
